creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to lumiwa from comment #0)
I'm not able to reproduce and the official package builds look fine. The log for the official package build is here:

http://beefy6.nyi.freebsd.org/data/latest-per-pkg/ncurses/6.2.20210213_1/122amd64-default.log

Can you please provide a complete log and all build configuration such as make.conf, other packages installed, etc.?
